## Type of change

- [ ] New test coverage
- [ ] Bug fix (broken test or wrong assertion)
- [ ] New endpoint / client method
- [ ] Schema update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] New schemas added to `schemas/` if a new endpoint is covered
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` updated if a new pattern was introduced
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files committed
